title: Delicate Syrian Chilli Bean Curry
description: A malty, silky, and light Syrian dish featuring chilli bean paste and coconut cream, prepared in a molcajete.
instructions: Heat the coconut cream in the molcajete over medium heat until it starts to crack and separate.
Add the chilli bean paste and stir until well combined.
Add the sliced red onion and cook until it is translucent and starting to caramelize.
Add the minced garlic and grated ginger and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the cumin seeds and coriander powder and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the salt and water, and stir until the curry starts to simmer.
Reduce the heat to low and let the curry simmer for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Stir in the chopped fresh cilantro and serve hot.
Serve the curry in individual bowls, garnished with additional cilantro if desired.
